expected_behavior: Should read the provided URL and produce a clear, concise summary of the article content.

prompt: Summarize these two articles: https://example.com/a https://example.com/b
expected_behavior: Should read both URLs and provide individual summaries for each article.

prompt: Can you read https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.01234 and explain the abstract?
expected_behavior: Should read the arXiv URL and explain the abstract.

prompt: Read https://example.com/tutorial and pull out all the code snippets
expected_behavior: Should read the URL and extract code snippets.

prompt: Read https://example.com/optionA and https://example.com/optionB and tell me which is better for a beginner
expected_behavior: Should read both URLs and provide a comparative analysis.

prompt: Read https://example.com/article and see if it relates to anything I've discussed before
expected_behavior: Should read the article and search memories for related discussions.
